budgetCategories.description: Care and support for older and disabled adults.

budgetCategories.description: Support and safeguarding for children, young people and families.

budgetCategories.description: Services that help people stay healthy and prevent illness.

budgetCategories.description: Waste, street cleaning, parks and environmental health.

feedItems.description: allocated £77.4m to Children's Social Care (≈£224 per resident)
allocated £130.6m to Adult Social Care (≈£379 per resident)
allocated £32.2m to Public Health (≈£93 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £107 (5.6%) to £2031
